store_headline: WordPress Music Theme for Record Labels and Bands
store_subheadline: A complete music platform for bands and record labels with discography, events, and merch
features: Artist custom post type with taxonomy connections
Video gallery with custom player options
Built with WPBakery Page Builder ($99 value)
Wolf WPBakery Extension with music-specific elements
Content Blocks system for custom headers and footers
One-click demo import with complete content
Mobile-optimized responsive design for all devices
Artist profiles linked to releases, events, and videos
selling_points: Artist taxonomy links individual artists to their releases, events, and videos — essential for labels and multi-member bands
Bridges band and label use cases — equally useful for a five-piece band or a six-act indie label
Complete WPBakery music feature set: discography, events, videos, photo albums, and WooCommerce in one purchase
Wolf Playlist Manager delivers in-page audio playback for releases and individual tracks
Artist profiles are first-class objects — each has its own page, not a sidebar widget
WooCommerce merch integration built in for bands and labels selling physical and digital goods
Content Blocks for custom headers and footers that don't require a developer to update
One-click demo import sets up a full music platform in minutes, not days
key_benefits: Run a label site where each artist profile links releases, events, videos
Manage multiple artists, side projects, or band members without duplicating pages
Launch a music platform for a touring band or a growing label
Sell merchandise and music to fans with WooCommerce built into the theme
Promote discography and tour dates with audio playback and event listings included
Build a presence that scales from debut EP to full label roster
design_features: Custom music player with playlist support

testimonials.text: Thank you greatly for top notch customer support. Both issues were quickly resolved and communication was outstanding.
testimonials.author: hempfulfarms

testimonials.text: Big thank you to the developers theme of this complete project. It is one of the fastest out there especially when it comes to the tons of features and customization options this theme has. Purchased, installed and customized in 7 days.. Now we are ready to push our Record Label company to the public once we are over with the copywriting. Thank you and you get 10/10
testimonials.author: Kiranov

testimonials.text: This is a great looking theme with tons of flexibility –– maybe too much, as I'm still discovering the many options available! Highly recommended.
testimonials.author: nickfaber
